---
title: "Take-home_Ex1"
author: "CHEN HO TUNG"
date: "January 10, 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"

format:
  html:
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-expand: true

execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
---

# Overview

## Import Package

```{r}
pacman::p_load(ggstatsplot, tidyverse,ggrepel, patchwork, janitor,colorspaces,ggstatsplot,ggdist,ggridges,FunnelPlotR,knitr,gganimate,gifski,gapminder,
               ggthemes, hrbrthemes,
               tidyverse,readxl)
```

## Import Data

```{r}
df_raw <- read_excel("data/Database paper.xlsx") %>%
  janitor::clean_names()
df_raw
```

```{r}


```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
